channel.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Learn

Websites

  • EOS Smart Contract Development Security Best Practices
  • ESC - EOS Study Center
  • EOSIO Developer Portal - A great place to begin your EOSIO blockchain journey.

    • Tools

    General

  • All Things EOS

    • Learn

    Interactive learning, labs

  • Elemental Battles - Build a blockchain game. Learn EOSIO.
    • Announcing Elemental Battles: Block.one's New Tutorial for On-boarding Aspiring Blockchain Developers
  • Block.one: Getting Started with the EOSIO Blockchain and Smart Contracts - Google Cloud training lab.

    • Community

    Blogs

  • cmichel - Christoph Michel blog, EOSIO developer related publications.
  • Blockgenic - Blockgenic blog, firm focused on Enterprise adoption of blockchain technology. Learning resources.

    • Learn

    Books

  • Learn EOS Development - The up-to-date, in-depth, complete guide to dapps on the EOS blockchain.

    • Developers

    Other in Developers

  • Community Developer Tools - Official EOSIO "Community Developer Tools" page.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
EdenOS

  • eoscommunity - Official GitHub.
  • More Equal Animals Book - Book by Daniel Larimer.

    • Developers

    Core

  • EOSIO/eosstars11.2k - Official EOSIO GitHub repository.
  • EOSIO/eos-vmstars164 - A Low-Latency, High Performance and Extensible WebAssembly Backend Library.

    • Developers

    Code examples

  • EOSIO/eosio.contractsstars285 - Smart contracts that provide some of the basic functions of the EOSIO blockchain.
  • greymass/anchor-link-demo-multipassstars3 - Example ReactJS application integrating greymass/anchor-link.
  • greymass/ual-anchor-demostars2 - Example ReactJS application integrating greymass/ual-anchor.
  • greymass/eosio-signing-request-demostars0 - Example generating transactions using greymass/eosio-signing-request.
  • greymass/anchor-link-demostars0 - Example VueJS application integrating greymass/anchor-link.

    • Official

  • GitHub

    • Learn

    Courses, workshops, webinars, videos and others

  • EOSIO Training & Certification - Official EOSIO Training & Certification.
  • EOSIO Resource Library - Official EOSIO Resources. Videos, case studies, and other resources to help you learn and grow with EOSIO.

    • Developers

    Environment

  • EOS Studio - Graphic IDE for EOSIO Development.
  • EOSIO Web IDEstars116 - The Web IDE provides developers with a personal single-node EOSIO blockchain for development and testing purposes, running in the Gitpod.io cloud – and accessible from your web browser.
  • Helm charts for EOSIOstars2 - EOSIO Nodeos Helm Charts.

    • Developers

    Testnets

  • The EOSIO Testnet - Block.one's official EOSIO Testnet. Test on fully-featured EOSIO stable releases.
  • Jungle Testnet - The Jungle TestNet was initiated by and has served as sandbox for many development teams and EOS Block Producers since the birth of EOSIO.
  • CryptoKylin Testnet - CryptoKylin Testnet is a developer-friendly testnet maintained by a group of EOS Mainnet Block Producers.

    • Developers

    API libraries

  • greymass/eosiostars8 - Strongly typed JavaScript library.
  • greymass/swift-eosiostars9 - Swift SDK with ESR support.

    • Developers

    Authentication and Signing libraries

  • greymass/anchor-linkstars17 - Persistent, fast and secure signature provider for EOSIO chains built on top of EOSIO Signing Requests (EEP-7).
  • greymass/eosio-signing-requeststars11 - Library to assist in creating and digesting EOSIO Signing Requests (ESR).
  • greymass/eosio-signing-request-javastars0 - Java wrapper for the EOSIO Signing Request protocol.
  • greymass/ual-anchorstars7 - Authenticator meant to be used with Anchor and Universal Authenticator Library.

    • Developers

    Developer Tools

  • greymass/eosio-resourcesstars3 - Tool to assist in network resource calculations.
  • greymass/abi2corestars0 - Command line utility to convert ABI definitions to greymass/eosio type definitions.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
EdenOS

  • Website - Official Website.

    • Learn

    Websites

  • EOS Learning Resources - EOS Costa Rica

    • Learn

    Courses, workshops, webinars, videos and others

  • EOSIO Webinars - Official EOSIO Webinars.
  • Building DApps on EOS: A Hands-On Workshop - Workshop.

    • Tools

    Desktop

  • EOS Authority Web Wallet
  • eoscanada/eoscstars128
  • Anchor Wallet
    • greymass/anchorstars397 - Official GitHub.

    • Developers

    API libraries

  • EOSRPC API Wrapper for Elixirstars17 - Elixir library.

    • Developers

    Frameworks

  • tokenika/eosfactorystars246 - Python-based EOSIO smart-contract development & unit testing framework.

    • Developers

    Developer Tools

  • Octopusstars272 - Security Analysis tool for WebAssembly and Blockchain Smart Contracts (BTC/ETH/NEO/EOS).

    • Developers

    Code examples

  • Eosfinex Custody Smart Contractstars14 - Eosfinex exchange smart contract.
    • Bitfinex blog post about eosfinex - Article.
  • eosnewyork/erpstars46 - EOS Resource Planner.

    • Developers

    Block Producer tools

  • pete001/eos-bp-failoverstars33 - EOSIO Block Producer Failover Scripts.

    • Community

    Blogs

  • Daniel Larimer - Blog of Daniel Larimer, founder of EOSIO.

    • Community

    Forums

  • EOSCommunity.org Forums

    • Tools

    Account services

  • EOS PowerUp

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2020
item.description:
Developers

Developer Tools

  • EOSIO Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM)stars69 - Ethereum Virtual Machine on EOSIO.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Developers

Frameworks

  • EOSLIMEstars33 - Truffle like framework for development, deployment and testing on EOS blockchains.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Mobile

  • OracleChain/PocketEOS-Androidstars163
  • OracleChain/PocketEOS-IOSstars112
  • Android client for EOS.IOstars219

    • Developers

    API libraries

  • memtrip/eosreach-androidstars38 - Kotlin / Android library.

    • Developers

    Authentication and Signing libraries

  • EOSIO/universal-authenticator-librarystars106 - A library for allowing apps to easily use different auth providers.
    • EOSIO Labs™ Release: The Universal Authenticator Library (UAL) — Increasing the Accessibility of Blockchain Applications - Article.
  • EOSIO/eosio-webauthn-example-appstars30 - Example web app demonstrating EOSIO signing via WebAuthn.
    • EOSIO Labs™ Release: WebAuthn Example Web App for EOSIO YubiKey Support - Article.
  • EOSIO/eosio-reference-chrome-extension-authenticator-appstars25 - Chrome extension reference app demonstrating how users could sign transactions using various EOSIO Labs tools.
    • EOSIO Labs™ Release: iOS and Chrome Extension Authenticator Reference Applications - Article.
  • EOSIO/eosio-reference-ios-authenticator-appstars65 - iOS reference app demonstrating inter-application transaction signing for EOSIO blockchain apps.
  • EOSIO/ual-scatterstars12 - Authenticator meant to be used with Scatter and Universal Authenticator Library.

    • Developers

    Developer Tools

  • EOSIO/eosio.cdtstars479 - EOSIO.CDT (Contract Development Toolkit) is a suite of tools used to build EOSIO contracts.
  • EOSIO/ricardian-template-toolkitstars30 - Renderer for the Ricardian Contract specification.

    • Developers

    Code examples

  • EOSIO/eosio-java-android-example-appstars25 - Application demonstrating integration with EOSIO-based blockchains using EOSIO SDK for Java.

    • Developers

    Block Producer tools

  • eosdetroit/bp-playbookstars4 - A set of playbooks to make managing EOS.IO nodes easier.
  • eoseoul/eos-ramcoststars6 - Adjusting supply of a token and connector balance of bancor during final phase of boot.

    • Developers

    Other in Developers

  • OracleChain/EOSBenchToolstars31 - A client side tool for EOS performance testing.
  • breakstring/savemyeosramstars5 - Saving RAM on EOS.

    • DApps

    Other in DApps

  • EveripediaNetwork/Everipediastars138 - The Everipedia Network protocol.
  • kesar/decentwitterstars34 - Decentralized Twitter on EOS.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio May 27th - Jun 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Developers

API libraries

  • EOSIO/eosjsstars1.4k - Official JavaScript SDK.
  • EOSIO/eosio-javastars109 - Official Java SDK.
    • eosiojava API - API documentation.
    • EOSIO™ Software Release: Native SDKs for Swift and Java - Article.
  • EOSIO/eosio-swiftstars58 - Official Swift SDK.
    • EOSIO SDK for Swift - API documentation.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Apr 8th - Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:
Learn

Courses, workshops, webinars, videos and others

  • Learning Blockchain Development with EOS and C++ - Udemy Course.
  • Starting with EOS Blockchain for Developers - Udemy Course.

    • Tools

    Desktop

  • cleos
    • EOSIO/eos - Official GitHub (part of EOSIO).

    • Developers

    API libraries

  • Transit API for EOS - Connecting signature providers and dApps through an open-source, modular, and simple standard for EOSIO-based blockchains.
    • eosnewyork/eos-transitstars71 - Official GitHub.
    • The Transit API: Connecting dApps & Signature Providers - Article.

    • Developers

    Code examples

  • poorman.tokenstars46 - EOSIO Token with burning and signup (for making the token RAM cheap).
  • EOSEssentials/Scatter-Demosstars81 - A set of integration demos using eosjs and Scatter.
  • ping-eosstars86 - Implementing ping between EOSIO / React.js.
  • ipfs-eos-demostars39 - Demo saving text and images to ipfs and storing the hash on the EOSIO blockchain.

    • Community

    YouTube Channels

  • Jackson Kelley - Developer related content.
  • CodingWithCrypto - Developer related content.
  • Filip Martinsson - Developer related content.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Developers

API libraries

  • React Native EOSstars42 - Native implementation of client to eos blockchain communication.

    • Official

  • Technical White Paperstars2.1k
  • Bug Bounty Program
  • Blog
  • StackExchange for Q&A
  • YouTube

    • Community

    Blogs

  • cc32d9 - cc32d9 blog, EOSIO developer related publications.
  • Dallas Rushing - Blog of Dallas Rushing, EOSIO user related content.
  • Iang - Blog of Iang, EOSIO user and developer related content.
  • EOS Canada - EOS Canada blog, user related content and videos.
  • Cypherglass - Cypherglass blog, user related content and videos. News.
  • EOS New York - EOS New York blog, user and developer related content.

    • Community

    YouTube Channels

  • EOS Go - ESO Go community meetings, podcasts, live streams. News and discussions.
  • Investing with a difference - EOSIO ecosystem overview, news and market discussions.
  • Dallas Rushing - Dallas Rushing channel. User related content and news.
  • nsjames - Scatter related content.
  • Crypto Dunker - Crypto Dunker channel. EOSIO DApps related content and news.
  • EOS Authority - EOS Authority. Useful tutorials, developers related.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Feb 18th - Feb 24th, 2019
item.description:
Developers

Frameworks

  • infeosstars29 - JavaScript based framework for development, building, deploying and unit testing EOSIO dApps.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Developers

Frameworks

  • Demuxstars298 - Demux is a backend infrastructure pattern for sourcing blockchain events to deterministically update queryable datastores and trigger side effects.
    • Introducing Demux — Deterministic Databases Off-Chain Verified by the EOSIO Blockchain - Article.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Aug 13th - Aug 19th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Block explorers, Voting portals

  • EOS Network Monitor - EOSIO Network Monitor by "CryptoLions". Useful for developers. Scatter friendly.
  • eosflare - Popular block explorer includes resource statistics, latest profile actions and statistics about "Top Name Bids" and "Top Voters".
  • EOS Tracker - Open Source block explorer includes producers information and account information.
    • EOSEssentials/EOSTrackerstars168 - Official GitHub.
  • Bloks - Fast block explorer, can be used for voting. Includes information about block producers and tokens.

    • Block Producers

  • GLASS - EOSIO Block Producer Map.
    • cypherglassdotcom/glassstars4 - Official GitHub.

    • Developers

    Developer Tools

  • EOSEssentials/EOSDropsstars55 - Airdropping tool for the EOSIO blockchain.
  • Elliptic curve cryptography functions (ECC)stars258 - Private Key, Public Key, Signature, AES, Encryption / Decryption.
    • Securely Generating an EOS Key Pair Using Official EOS.IO Code - YouTube.

    • Developers

    Block Producer tools

  • Patroneosstars45 - RPC Checkpoint for EOSIO nodes.
  • Cypherglass WINDSHIELDstars19 - A dashboard tool for monitoring internal Block Producer infrastructure.

    • Developers

    Other in Developers

  • cleos-auto-completionstars31 - Command auto-completion for EOSIO cleos.
  • EOS-Syncstars59 - Syncing the EOSIO blockchain data to mongodb database.

    • DApps

    Other in DApps

  • eosfilestorestars42 - Immutable, censorship resistant, cheap, file storage on EOSIO blockchain.

    • Developers

    Frameworks

  • SwiftyEOSstars95 - Framework for interacting with EOS, written in Swift.

    • Developers

    API libraries

  • EOS.IO Go API librarystars531 - Go library.
  • EOS Java API Wrapperstars161 - Java library.
  • eosnetstars7 - .NET library.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
DApps

Games

  • King Of EOS
    • MrToph/KingOfEosstars33 - Official GitHub.
    • Introducing King of EOS - Article.
    • Learnings from building my first dapp on EOS blockchain - Article.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
DApps

DApp directories

  • EOSindex

    • DApps

    Games

  • MonsterEOS
    • MonsterEOS/monstereosstars174 - Official GitHub.

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Official

  • Block.one

    • Block Producers

  • EOS Block Producer Research Portal

item.title: DanailMinchev/awesome-eosio Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Community

Forums

  • EOS - Reddit
  • EOSDev - Reddit

    • Tools

    Desktop

  • Scatter
    • GetScatter/ScatterDesktopstars472 - Official GitHub.
  • EOS Toolkit
    • eostoolkit/eostoolkitstars90 - Official GitHub.
  • SimplEOS
    • eosrio/simpleosstars157 - Official GitHub.

    • Tools

    Account services

  • Get alerts for transactions on an account - EOS Authority
